reviews.comment:
Buenas y rápida atención, muchos surtidores. Lo que no sé entiende que la tienda full cierre por la noche, dada su ubicación

(Translated by Google)
Good and fast service, plenty of pumps. What I don't understand is why the full-service store closes at night, given its location.

reviews.comment:
En el shop muy buena atención, en el baño de hombres estaba limpio, pero la mayoría de los gabinetes con inodoro cerrados con llave, creo que hay 6, y sólo 2 habilitados, y ocupados. Debe ser que lo que no se usa no se ensucia, y lo que no se ensucia no se limpia.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the shop was very good. The men's restroom was clean, but most of the toilet stalls were locked. I think there are 6, and only 2 were open and occupied. It must be that what isn't used doesn't get dirty, and what isn't dirty doesn't get cleaned.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYNHFqWnZRRRAB
